Sirentide — Git graph

Live renderer output — the SVG below was produced by Sirentide from the DSL beside it.

gitGraph
commit
commit id: "init"
branch develop
checkout develop
commit
commit id: "feature"
checkout main
merge develop
commit id: "release"

A commit graph. commit adds a node to the current branch's lane; branch name / checkout name open and switch lanes (each a distinct palette colour); merge name draws an elbow connector from that branch's tip into a merge commit on the active lane. Commits advance in declaration order; commit id: "x" labels a node.

All fourteen types on one page: showcase.html · browser-audited renders: gallery
